summary: Nova Retail Group VP Stephanie Blair and senior security engineer Andre Coleman contacted Aegis Cloud Security support regarding an SSO outage affecting approximately 38-42% of their 1,200 users since February 10th. Aegis support identified a likely regression introduced by a patch deployed on February 9th affecting SAML NameID format handling in the Identity module. A temporary workaround was provided via bulk per-user local auth override in the admin console, while a permanent fix is estimated within 48 hours. Stephanie expressed significant frustration over the four-day outage coinciding with Valentine's Day, one of Nova Retail's busiest sales days, and the lack of proactive communication from Aegis.
actionItems: Sarah Chen: Escalate patch priority with engineering and follow up with updated fix ETA by end of day today
Sarah Chen: Flag status page communication gap internally and ensure a status update is published for affected customers
Elena Vasquez: Draft and send an incident summary email within the hour for Stephanie to share with her CISO
Andre Coleman: Apply bulk Authentication Override workaround to approximately 450 affected users in the Aegis Identity admin console

keyMoments.text: Stephanie expresses frustration that a patch was deployed the day before the outage began and they are only hearing about it now after four days of users being locked out.
keyMoments.speaker: Stephanie Blair

keyMoments.text: Andre confirms that the local auth workaround is largely inapplicable because Nova Retail enforced SSO-only per Aegis's own recommended documentation, eliminating the primary suggested workaround.
keyMoments.speaker: Andre Coleman

keyMoments.text: Elena walks Andre through the bulk Authentication Override option in the admin console, providing a viable stopgap for the affected users on the same day as the call.
keyMoments.speaker: Elena Vasquez

keyMoments.text: Stephanie acknowledges the team is not leaving Aegis but states she needs to see responsiveness, and accepts the offer of a drafted incident summary email to share with her CISO.
keyMoments.speaker: Stephanie Blair
